meaning: n.劳动,劳力,劳工,努力,分娩,工作v.劳动,苦干,费力地前进,分娩,工作,悉心完成adj.支持工党的,与工党有关的
examples: Labour is ahead in the poll.
She belongs to the Labour Party.
Shadow Treasury Minister Cathy Jamieson told the House that Labour would support the backbench motion.
Labour leader Ed Miliband called for a "rapid response" from the government to help affected communities.
